signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows lengthen, markets bleed silent warnings.
signals.questPulse: Scan for hidden nodes among risky altcoin debris.
signals.worldFeed: Network flux unsettles; market cap flickers downward.
signals.clueEvent: Dwindling digits hint at deeper system unrest.

signals.npcLine: RAVE spikes, but watch—the surge masks lurking decay.
signals.questPulse: Investigate strange spikes linked to volatile synth tokens.
signals.worldFeed: Unsteady pulses from alt-chain sectors confuse scanners.
signals.clueEvent: Volatile signal bursts disrupt stablenet flows.

signals.npcLine: Fear levels rise to code red; trust no exchange.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt chatter warning of imminent market collapse.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted warnings of unstable digital credits flood nodes.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid token moves stealthily; may unlock covert caches.
signals.questPulse: Locate hidden contracts slipping through network cracks.
signals.worldFeed: Minor cryptos gravitate toward obscure, shadowed sectors.
signals.clueEvent: Ghost leads hint at silent crypto reserves.

signals.npcLine: WOJAK chants rise; memes mutate into market weapons.
signals.questPulse: Track memetic currency shifts disrupting data flows.
signals.worldFeed: Culture bugs spread, destabilizing digital economies.
signals.clueEvent: Viral codes alter trade patterns unpredictably.
